trending_themes.theme: Second mini album 'II' — Do Your Dance, June 15
trending_themes.evidence: 6 tracks led by 'Do Your Dance'. Eunseok solo trailer released May 26. First comeback in 7 months since 'Fame'.

trending_themes.theme: First K-pop group at Lollapalooza South America
trending_themes.evidence: Performed March 2026 in Argentina, Chile, Brazil. Also Austin City Limits debut.

trending_themes.theme: Fastest K-pop boy group to Tokyo Dome — 120K attendees over 3 nights
trending_themes.evidence: ~2.5 years post-debut; 'All of You' Japan single earned Platinum certification.

trending_themes.theme: RIIZING LOUD World Tour — 420K fans, 21 regions
trending_themes.evidence: Tour concluded March 2026. Cinema livestreaming of finale. Fastest-rising SM act.

notable_movements: Fastest K-pop boy group to Tokyo Dome

annotation_hooks: RIIZE embodies post-pandemic K-pop's Western festival integration — their rapid trajectory (2023 debut → 2026 Lollapalooza) reflects SM's intentional global-first positioning
'Emotional pop' label signals genre maturation: K-pop moving from high-energy performance toward introspective, accessible emotional expression
Tokyo Dome record within 2.5 years mirrors the compressed growth timeline that BTS took 5+ years to achieve — industry has accelerated
raw_headlines: RIIZE Announces Second Mini Album II June 15
RIIZE First K-pop Group at Lollapalooza South America
RIIZE Tokyo Dome Record Fastest K-pop Boy Group
KILL SHOT Anime Tie-in Single April 2026
